description:
Direct probe on 2026-06-13 shows 13 of the 14 fixtures still marked `defer.fz2-build: compiler2 native build parity still red` now build and run successfully through `./target/debug/fz2 build ... && <binary>`. The only remaining red fixture in that cohort is `fixtures2/behavior/lambda_sugars.fz`, which fails AOT/native build with:

`fz2 build: compiler2 root 0 AOT compile failed: codegen: native callable value Var(0) has no settled callable boundary`

This is no longer a timeout/load issue. It is a real compiler2 native-build bug around callable-boundary settlement for lambda sugar / capture shorthand.
title: Compiler2 AOT lambda_sugars lacks settled callable boundary
